assumption_description: Current network follows existing logistics conditions as the baseline path.
Baseline path assumes no major rail reconfiguration or major storage step-change.
Baseline path reflects only modest operational efficiency gains by 2030.
Early intervention phase: initial rail service upgrades start capturing long-haul grain flows.
Mid intervention phase: inland storage and southeast capacity expansions begin to enter service.
Port regulation and scheduling improvements reduce friction in selected grain corridors.
By 2030 the mock proposed network reaches full target routing and capacity assumptions.
